name: Tomato Vegetable Juice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped green or red bell peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the tomatoes into quarters.
2. Crush 1 pound of quartered tomatoes in a heavy 10 qt saucepan until no chunks remain, quickly bringing to a boil and continuing to add more tomatoes while crushing them.
3. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Press the hot mixture through a sieve or food mill to remove skins and seeds.
6. Reheat to boiling.
7. Add 2 tablespoons bottled lemon juice per quart jar.
8. Immediately fill hot jars with juice, leaving 1/2 inch headspace.
9. Apply properly sealed lids and process in a boiling water canner for 40 minutes.
This recipe makes 7 quarts.
